programme.desc: De uitdrukking 'Jorge Martin: Van de hemel naar de hel' verwijst naar twee verschillende, contrasterende periodes voor de coureur. programme.title: KICK 't MET
programme.desc: Tijjani Noslin deelt zijn onwaarschijnlijke levensverhaal van Subway-medewerker tot smaakmaker in de Serie A bij Lazio Roma. Hij praat openhartig over zijn moeilijke jeugd, de loodzware burn-out die hij onderweg overwon en de extreme druk van de kritische Italiaanse achterban. Tot slot legt de vastberaden aanvaller uit waarom hij zijn droom voor het Nederlands elftal nog niet opgeeft en hoe een emotioneel advies van zijn moeder hem deed besluiten om te blijven wachten op Oranje.

Een finale die we niet snel zullen vergeten.

programme.title: Kick 't Met On Tour
programme.sub-title: De Coppa Italia finale Lazio - Inter
programme.desc: In een nieuwe aflevering van Kick 't Met On Tour: de Coppa Italia! Armin en Jefferson bezoeken in het iconische Stadio Olimpico de bekerfinale tussen Lazio en Inter. Eenmaal daar waren de heren onder de indruk van de sfeer en wie ze wel niet allemaal tegen kwamen. De nostalgische Italiaanse voetbalharten gingen sneller kloppen bij de mannen en na de wedstrijd deelde ze mee in de feestvreugde van Internazionale samen met Denzel Dumfries.

programme.title: Wes & Raf
programme.desc: In aflevering 3 van Wes & Raf blikken Wesley Sneijder en Rafael van der Vaart samen met Noa Vahle terug op hun gezamenlijke jaren in het Nederlands elftal. Van onvergetelijke hoogtepunten op eindtoernooien tot de teleurstellingen die Oranje ook kende: alles komt voorbij. Hoe bijzonder is het om het Oranje-shirt te dragen en je land te vertegenwoordigen op het hoogste podium? En hoe kon het dat Oranje na het magische WK van 2010 twee jaar later zo teleurstellend presteerde op het EK van 2012?

programme.title: Wes & Raf
programme.desc: In aflevering 3 van Wes & Raf blikken Wesley Sneijder en Rafael van der Vaart samen met Noa Vahle terug op hun gezamenlijke jaren in het Nederlands elftal. Van onvergetelijke hoogtepunten op eindtoernooien tot de teleurstellingen die Oranje ook kende: alles komt voorbij. Hoe bijzonder is het om het Oranje-shirt te dragen en je land te vertegenwoordigen op het hoogste podium? En hoe kon het dat Oranje na het magische WK van 2010 twee jaar later zo teleurstellend presteerde op het EK van 2012?

programme.title: Het finale duel: Ronaldo vs Messi
programme.desc: In deze documentaire de twee genieën die voorbestemd waren om een tijdperk te bepalen, botsten op hetzelfde podium. Deze documentaire onderzoekt de oorsprong van de rivaliteit tussen Cristiano Ronaldo en Lionel Messi, het moment waarop hun confrontatie het Spaanse voetbal veranderde en grootsheid in het moderne voetbal voorgoed herdefinieerde.

programme.title: Frank Slotta maakt kennis met rugby: Schotland - Frankrijk in de Six Nations
programme.desc: Frank Slotta had nog nooit een rugbywedstrijd gezien: hoog tijd dus voor Jay-Jay Boske om hem mee te nemen! En niet zomaar een wedstrijd: in Schotland strijdt het thuisland tegen titelverdediger Frankrijk in de Six Nations. Wint Schotland? Dan ligt alles open voor de laatste speelronde, met nog 3 titelkandidaten. Wint Frankrijk? Dan kan het de titel prolongeren… Slotta laat zich onderdompelen in alles wat rugby zo'n mooie, unieke sport maakt.

programme.title: Jorge Martin: From Heaven to Hell
programme.desc: De uitdrukking 'Jorge Martin: Van de hemel naar de hel' verwijst naar twee verschillende, contrasterende periodes voor de coureur. Letterlijker kan het verwijzen naar een dramatische verschuiving in zijn carrière: zijn hemel was het winnen van het MotoGP-kampioenschap van 2024, terwijl zijn hel een blessure werd die hem dwong de laatste races van het seizoen 2025, die hij met nummer 1 zou hebben gereden, te missen.

programme.title: Ep.3
programme.desc: Alle origini del nuovo talento italiano della F1: il legame con la famiglia, le amicizie speciali e il mito di Senna. In questo episodio Antonelli ci svela le sue passioni e ci apre le porte di casa.

programme.title: GP Giappone: Gara
programme.desc: Terza gara della stagione sulla mitica pista di Suzuka: la Mercedes ha vinto i primi due GP, la Ferrari non trionfa in Giappone dal 2004. Telecronaca di Carlo Vanzini, Marc Gene' e Roberto Chinchero

programme.title: F1 Sprint: GP CINA 14/03/2025
programme.desc: Prima gara del weekend sulla distanza di 100km: chi conquistera' gli 8 punti in palio per il vincitore? Telecronaca di Carlo Vanzini, Marc Gene' e Roberto Chinchero.

programme.title: GP Cina: Gara
programme.desc: Seconda gara della stagione: dopo la doppietta Mercedes a Melbourne chi trionfera' a Shanghai? Telecronaca di Carlo Vanzini, Marc Gene' e Roberto Chinchero.

programme.title: Honda Indy 200 at Mid-Ohio
programme.desc: From Mid-Ohio Sports Car Course in Lexington, Ohio.

programme.title: Roma: l'eterna
programme.desc: S3 Ep3 Roma: L'eterna - Annagrazia cerca una seconda casa a Roma per le sue due figlie Caterina e Cristiana. Questa volta il campo di battaglia dei nostri due esperti, Giulia e Nicola, sara' la Citta' Eterna.

programme.title: Case
programme.desc: S1 Ep3 Case - Shawn, agente immobiliare di Los Angeles, e' alla ricerca di una casa per un miliardario. Inoltre, incontriamo Freedom che sta rinnovando il suo appartamento a Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Na Pizza S.3 Ep.05
programme.desc: S3 Ep5 Na Pizza S.3 Ep.05 - In questa puntata Renato Bosco ospitera' Ciro Tutino, pizzaiolo napoletano da ben cinque generazioni.

programme.title: Ep. 11
programme.desc: S15 Ep11 - Le coppie devono preparare non solo una dozzina di macaron, ma anche una gigantesca torre di prelibatezze dalla forma perfetta.

programme.title: Ep. 12
programme.desc: S15 Ep12 - Le coppie vengono divise in due squadre, che devono servire gli attendenti di un giardino popolato da appassionati di barbecue.

programme.title: Na Pizza S.3 Ep.05
programme.desc: S3 Ep5 Na Pizza S.3 Ep.05 - In questa puntata Renato Bosco ospitera' Ciro Tutino, pizzaiolo napoletano da ben cinque generazioni.

programme.title: Ep. 1
programme.desc: S1 Ep1 - Stefano Cavada e i coach Andrea Tortora e Renato Bosco giudicheranno le specialita' della paladina della cucina healthy Diletta Secco.

programme.title: Ep. 2
programme.desc: S1 Ep2 - Stefano Cavada, insieme ai coach Andrea Tortora e Renato Bosco, dovra' decidere se l'orgoglio di Napoli Giovanni Castaldi ha un animo dolce o salato!

programme.title: Liguria: Golfo del Tigullio
programme.desc: S3 Ep4 Liguria: Golfo del Tigullio - La famiglia Fiori desidera una seconda casa al mare fra Santa Margherita Ligure e Camogli. Vincera' l'intuito di Giulia o sara' Nicola a trovare l'ispirazione giusta?

programme.title: Genova
programme.desc: S7 Ep2 Genova - Genova e' pronta ad accogliere un nuovo esploratore: Bruno Barbieri. 4 Hotel ci accompagnera' tra i carruggi della "Signora del mare" alla ricerca della sua anima piu' autentica.

programme.title: Ep.06
programme.desc: S8 Ep6 - Protagoniste di puntata sono quattro spose che per il gran giorno hanno scelto location orgogliosamente sul mare. E chissa'...ci sara' il bagno di mezzanotte?

programme.title: I sentimenti cambiano tutto
programme.desc: S1 Ep3 I sentimenti cambiano tutto - Tra storie d'amore in divenire e false piste, il percorso di un concorrente giunge al termine. Due nuovi concorrenti a sorpresa stravolgono immediatamente il gioco.

programme.title: Che l'inganno abbia inizio
programme.desc: S1 Ep4 Che l'inganno abbia inizio - I nuovi arrivati Peter e Jana non perdono tempo e scatenano subito un po' di trambusto. Dopo essere stato votato come il piu' affidabile, Biggy si trova di fronte a un bivio: tradire un membro dell'alleanza o rischiare lui stesso l'eliminazione.

programme.title: Ep.06
programme.desc: S8 Ep6 - Protagoniste di puntata sono quattro spose che per il gran giorno hanno scelto location orgogliosamente sul mare. E chissa'...ci sara' il bagno di mezzanotte?

programme.title: Ep.05
programme.desc: S8 Ep5 - I matrimoni di queste quattro spose si tingeranno di verde, colore dell'energia, della natura e della speranza: soprattutto quella di vincere Quattro Matrimoni!

programme.title: Ep. 21
programme.desc: S2 Ep21 - Due coppie di cuochi amatoriali dovranno trasformare per un giorno la propria casa in un vero Home Restaurant. A giudicarli Giorgio Locatelli ed Enzo Miccio.

programme.title: Lago di Bolsena
programme.desc: S7 Ep3 Lago di Bolsena - Bruno Barbieri e' alla ricerca di strutture originali attorno al Lago di Bolsena, tra notti stellate ed esperienze insolite, alla scoperta del lago vulcanico piu' grande d'Europa.

programme.title: Lucca
programme.desc: S9 Ep12 Lucca - Alessandro Borghese e' alla ricerca della migliore osteria di Lucca. Tra tradizione e modernita', la citta' custodisce un ricco patrimonio artistico, culturale e naturalmente gastronomico.

programme.title: Monza
programme.desc: S9 Ep13 Monza - Da secoli luogo di villeggiatura dei reali, Monza ha un'anima elegante che si ritrova nelle vie del centro storico e nella proposta culinaria. Quale sara' il migliore ristorante chic?

programme.title: Ep.06
programme.desc: S8 Ep6 - Protagoniste di puntata sono quattro spose che per il gran giorno hanno scelto location orgogliosamente sul mare. E chissa'...ci sara' il bagno di mezzanotte?

programme.title: Ep. 11
programme.desc: S15 Ep11 - Le coppie devono preparare non solo una dozzina di macaron, ma anche una gigantesca torre di prelibatezze dalla forma perfetta.

programme.title: Ep. 12
programme.desc: S15 Ep12 - Le coppie vengono divise in due squadre, che devono servire gli attendenti di un giardino popolato da appassionati di barbecue.

programme.title: Sardegna
programme.desc: S9 Ep10 Sardegna - Zona della Sardegna con una storia millenaria che affonda le radici tanto in montagna quanto lungo la sua costa meravigliosa, Ogliastra e' il terreno di una sfida tutta al femminile.

programme.title: Gorizia
programme.desc: S9 Ep11 Gorizia - Gorizia e' una citta' che da sempre attinge dalle numerose culture che la influenzano, da quella austroungarica a quella veneziana, da quella slava a quella friulana.

programme.title: Eintracht - Atalanta

programme.title: La dinastia di Sir Alex

programme.title: La Coppa dei Campioni

School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Here, discover some of the game's best-kept short game secrets. Ep 2.

programme.title: The Open Films: Ballesteros 1988
programme.desc: A look back at some of the best contests at The Open in years gone by. Here, The 1988 Open at Royal Lytham & St Annes Golf Club, as heavy rain saw the first Monday finish in Open history.

programme.title: The Open Films: Calcavecchia 1989
programme.desc: A look back at some of the best contests at The Open in years gone by. Here, The 1989 Open at Royal Troon Golf Club, where an American golfer would seize his first - and only - Major.

programme.title: Evian Championship Highlights
programme.desc: The second day of the Amundi Evian Championship at Evian Resort Golf Club in France. Grace Kim earned her first Major title here a year ago. (10.07)

programme.title: Golf Academy: Sorenstam Short Game
programme.desc: Professional golfers give advice on how to improve your game from the tee to the green. Here, golf star Annika Sörenstam demonstrates the short game.

programme.title: Golf Academy:Harrington Full Swing
programme.desc: The Golf Academy offers guidance and all the key tips and tricks on how to make your golfing game even stronger. Here, Padraig Harrington offers up a full swing special.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Day two of the PGA Tour's ISCO Championship, taking place at Hurstbourne Country Club in Louisville, Kentucky. Thursday's first-round lead was shared by four at the summit.

programme.title: Live Evian Championship Golf R3
programme.desc: The third day of the Amundi Evian Championship at Evian Resort Golf Club in France. At the halfway stage of the fourth women's Major of the year, England's Lottie Woad leads the way.

programme.title: Live DP World Tour Golf
programme.desc: The third round of the Scottish Open in North Berwick. As Rory McIlroy maintained a share of the lead, Scottie Scheffler shockingly missed the cut in a hit to his Open preparations.

programme.title: Evian Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Day three of the Amundi Evian Championship at Evian Resort Golf Club in France. At the halfway stage of the fourth women's Major of the year, England's Lottie Woad leads the way. (11.07)

programme.title: Live PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Day three of the PGA Tour's ISCO Championship, taking place at Hurstbourne Country Club in Louisville, Kentucky. Lucas Glover leads heading into the weekend.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Ep 9.

programme.title: Scottish Open 2022 Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the fourth and final day of the 2022 Genesis Scottish Open, taking place at the Renaissance Club in North Berwick.

programme.title: The Open Films: Faldo 1990
programme.desc: A look back at some of the best contests at The Open in years gone by. Here, The 1990 Open at the Old Course, St Andrews, where Nick Faldo was going for his second Major of the year.

programme.title: Evian Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Day three of the Amundi Evian Championship at Evian Resort Golf Club in France. At the halfway stage of the fourth women's Major of the year, England's Lottie Woad leads the way. (11.07)

programme.title: Golf Academy
programme.desc: Professional golfers give advice on how to improve your game across all aspects, from the tee to the green. Here, Swedish Major winner Pernilla Lindberg offers her top tips.

programme.title: Golf Academy: Jon Rahm
programme.desc: Spanish superstar Jon Rahm joins the Golf Academy to discuss his career and give some helpful tips on improving your game.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Day three of the PGA Tour's ISCO Championship, taking place at Hurstbourne Country Club in Louisville, Kentucky. Lucas Glover leads heading into the weekend.

programme.title: Live Evian Championship Golf R4
programme.desc: The final day of the Amundi Evian Championship at Evian Resort Golf Club in France. Grace Kim earned her first Major title here a year ago.

programme.title: Live DP World Tour Golf
programme.desc: The fourth and final round of the Genesis Scottish Open - a DP World Tour Rolex Series event - at the Renaissance Club.

programme.title: Evian Championship Highlights
programme.desc: The final day of the Amundi Evian Championship at Evian Resort Golf Club in France. Grace Kim earned her first Major title here a year ago. (12.07)

programme.title: Belgian F1 GP Highlights 2014
programme.desc: The 2014 Belgian Grand Prix from the Circuit de Spa-Francorchamps. Nico Rosberg claimed pole position ahead of Mercedes teammate Lewis Hamilton.

programme.title: Belgian F1 GP Highlights 2015
programme.desc: The 2015 Belgian Grand Prix at the Circuit de Spa-Francorchamps in Stavelot. Daniel Ricciardo was victorious here last year, pipping Nico Rosberg to top spot on the podium by three seconds.

programme.title: Belgian F1 GP Highlights 2016
programme.desc: The 2016 Belgian Grand Prix from Circuit de Spa-Francorchamps. Nico Rosberg starts on pole as he looks to cut the championship lead of Lewis Hamilton - who starts at the back of the grid.

programme.title: Belgian F1 GP Highlights 2017
programme.desc: The 2017 Belgian Grand Prix, held at Circuit de Spa-Francorchamps. Nico Rosberg was the winner at this race last year.

programme.title: British F1 Grand Prix
programme.desc: It's lights out at Silverstone. Kimi Antonelli and Charles Leclerc form the front row with Lewis Hamilton, chasing a 10th British Grand Prix win, in third. George Russell starts P4. (05.07)

programme.desc: Ted Kravitz is live following the British Grand Prix, as he shares his thoughts on the race while gathering reactions from the paddock.

programme.desc: Highlights from the third stop on the 2026 GB3 Championship calendar from the Hungaroring in Budapest.

programme.title: Ginetta Junior Champ Hlts

programme.title: F1 Football Skills
programme.desc: The F1 grid display their ball skills.

programme.title: Live Goodwood Festival of Speed
programme.desc: Lando Norris returns to the balcony in celebration of his 2025 world championship success before Gerhard Berger takes the spotlight, 40 years on from his first F1 race win in Mexico.

programme.title: Lewis Hamilton Ferrari Story
programme.desc: Sky F1's Ted Kravitz looks back at Lewis Hamilton's Barcelona Grand Prix win, the seven-time world champion's first in the red of Ferrari.

programme.title: British F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out at Silverstone. Kimi Antonelli and Charles Leclerc form the front row with Lewis Hamilton, chasing a 10th British Grand Prix win, in third. George Russell starts P4. (05.07)

programme.title: Weekend Wrapped
programme.desc: Revisit the second F1 Academy weekend of the 2026 season with a recap of all the racing from Silverstone.

programme.title: British F1 GP: Sprint
programme.desc: The fourth F1 Sprint this season sees Lewis Hamilton start in pole position with Kimi Antonelli behind. Max Verstappen and Charles Leclerc share the second row. (04.07)

programme.title: British F1 Grand Prix
programme.desc: It's lights out at Silverstone. Kimi Antonelli and Charles Leclerc form the front row with Lewis Hamilton, chasing a 10th British Grand Prix win, in third. George Russell starts P4. (05.07)

programme.title: Ted's Notebook: Britain
programme.desc: Ted Kravitz is live following the British Grand Prix, as he shares his thoughts on the race while gathering reactions from the paddock.

programme.title: PL Retro: Newcastle v Man Utd 1996
programme.desc: Relive a classic game from the 1996-97 Premier League season as title chasers Newcastle and Manchester United meet at St James' Park. It would be a memorable afternoon for the Magpies.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Bolton/Chelsea 2005
programme.desc: Chelsea: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for the league's 49 clubs, as voted for by fans. For Chelsea, the win over Bolton in 2005 that won the Blues their first title in 50 years.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:M City/L'Pool 15
programme.desc: Relive a Premier League classic, as Man City face Liverpool back in November 2015. City needed a win to go back top of the table, while Liverpool were adapting to life under Jurgen Klopp.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:M City/L'Pool 13
programme.desc: Relive a Premier League classic, as Man City face Liverpool back in 2013. City needed three points to close the gap at the top to Man Utd, while the Reds were chasing a top four spot.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Man U/L'Pool '95
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Man United host Liverpool in October 1995, as Eric Cantona returned from his lengthy suspension in a thrilling 2-2 draw.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:L'Pool/Man U '97
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Liverpool meet Manchester United at Anfield in 1997, in a match that had a happy outcome for the Red Devils.

programme.title: Best Premier League Goals 21/22
programme.desc: A compilation of breathtaking goals during the 2021-2022 Premier League season, including long shots, solo goals and bicycle kicks from some of the top flight's finest footballers.

programme.title: Best PL Goals: Manchester United
programme.desc: Enjoy the best Premier League goals scored by Manchester United over the years. See strikes from legends of the game including Ryan Giggs, David Beckham and more.

programme.title: Best PL Goals: M City v Liverpool
programme.desc: Take a look back at some of the best Premier League goals from top flight clashes between Manchester City and Liverpool.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games: Ars v AV 19/20
programme.desc: A look at some memorable matches in the Premier League. Here, Arsenal take on Aston Villa in a back-and-forth encounter early in the 2019-2020 season.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games: Sheff U v Man U
programme.desc: A look at some memorable matches in the Premier League. Here, Sheffield United and Manchester United met in an instant classic in the 2019-2020 season.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games: Liv v Man City
programme.desc: Relive a classic Premier League clash, as Jurgen Klopp's rampant Liverpool side take on defending champions Manchester City in the 2019-2020 season.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games: Liv v Eve 19/20
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Merseyside rivals Liverpool and Everton go head-to-head at Anfield in a game that was packed full of goals.

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: A look back at the weekend's action in the Premier League, featuring all of the goals, news and major talking points from around the top flight.

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: A look back at the weekend's action in the Premier League, featuring all of the goals, news and major talking points from around the top flight.

programme.title: PL: West Ham v Nott'm Forest Hlts
programme.desc: On a huge night at the London Stadium in the futures of West Ham and Nottingham Forest, two relegation-threatened sides compete for three much-needed Premier League points. (06.01)

programme.title: PL: Bournemouth v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: With the pressure on both Andoni Iraola and Thomas Frank amid poor runs of form, Bournemouth take on Spurs at the Vitality. A win here for either team here would be a massive boost. (07.01)

programme.title: PL: Brentford v Sunderland Hlts
programme.desc: One of the Premier League's form teams Brentford, now seventh with 30 points on the board, welcome Sunderland, who remain in the capital after a draw with Spurs at the weekend. (07.01)

programme.title: PL: C. Palace v A. Villa Hlts
programme.desc: Bouncing back from defeat with a win Saturday, third-in-the-table Aston Villa head to Selhurst Park as their hosts Palace attempt to rediscover some of their early season form. (07.01)

programme.title: PL: Everton v Wolves Hlts
programme.desc: With renewed belief, the task at hand for Wolves remains sizeable as Rob Edwards' men head to the Hill Dickinson Stadium, where Everton were swept aside by Brentford at the weekend. (07.01)

programme.title: PL: Fulham v Chelsea Hlts
programme.desc: Beginning the post-Enzo Maresca era with a point at the Etihad, Chelsea's next test comes at the Cottage against west London rivals Fulham - now unbeaten in their last five. (07.01)

programme.title: PL: Man City v Brighton Hlts
programme.desc: Left frustrated here Sunday, can Pep Guardiola's Manchester City temporarily close the gap to the leaders Arsenal with all three points against Fabian Hurzeler's Brighton? (07.01)

programme.title: PL: Newcastle v Leeds Utd Hlts
programme.desc: Under the St James' Park lights, Daniel Farke's Leeds United travel to take on Eddie Howe's Newcastle. The hosts began 2026 with a hard-fought 2-0 win over an out-of-touch Palace. (07.01)

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Man Utd Hlts
programme.desc: Appointed interim boss following the bombshell dismissal of Ruben Amorim, Darren Fletcher occupies the dugout for Manchester United's Premier League trip to Burnley. (07.01)

programme.title: PL: Arsenal v Liverpool Hlts
programme.desc: Arsenal's Premier League-winning credentials are put to the test as the title favourites entertain reigning champions Liverpool. The Gunners have won five in a row in the league. (08.01)

programme.title: PL: Man Utd v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: Manchester derby day marks Michael Carrick's first game back in charge of United as the 44-year-old pits his side against Pep Guardiola's City at Old Trafford in the Premier League. (17.01)

programme.title: PL: Chelsea v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: Liam Rosenior gets his first taste of the Premier League with Chelsea's clash against London rivals Brentford. The Bees, now flirting with Europe, are two points clear of Chelsea. (17.01)

programme.title: PL: Leeds Utd v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: From relegation candidates to European contenders, Marco Silva looks to keep Fulham's stark turnaround ticking over with a Premier League trip to Daniel Farke's Leeds. (17.01)

programme.title: PL: Liverpool v Burnley Hlts
programme.desc: Holding firm at the home of this season's title favourites, Liverpool eye all three points this time out as the Reds host a Burnley side eight points from top-flight safety. (17.01)

programme.title: PL: Sunderland v C. Palace Hlts
programme.desc: Six Premier League games without a win, an injury-hit Crystal Palace head to the Stadium of Light, where hosts Regis Le Bris' Sunderland also target a return to winning ways. (17.01)

programme.title: PL: Spurs v West Ham Hlts
programme.desc: Bitter London rivals Spurs and West Ham meet at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, with both under-pressure managers Thomas Frank and Nuno Espirito Santo in dire need of a result. (17.01)

programme.title: PL: Wolves v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: Unbeaten in three, Rob Edwards' improving Wolves take on Eddie Howe's visiting Newcastle side. The Magpies prevailed in a breathless seven-goal thriller with Leeds last time out. (18.01)

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v Everton Hlts
programme.desc: Aston Villa, left frustrated by injury-hit Palace, return home to face Everton - who also come from stalemate. It's nearly 10 years since Everton's last top-flight win over Villa. (18.01)

programme.title: MNF: Brighton v Bournemouth Hlts
programme.desc: Three points separate Brighton and Bournemouth heading into this contest. Antoine Semenyo provided a parting gift with the winner in the Cherries' 3-2 win over Spurs. (19.01)

programme.desc: Spend a day with Dean Ashton as he reflects on a career that promised so much. From his rise through the Football League to becoming one of the Premier League's most exciting forwards.

programme.desc: A maiden ATP Tour crown is on the line as home hope Alejandro Davidovich Fokina, 0-5 in finals, meets Ethan Quinn as the two collide in a title showdown on the grass of Mallorca. (27.06)

programme.title: ATP Final: Halle
programme.desc: A men's singles champion is crowned in the Halle final.

programme.title: ATP Final: Indian Wells
programme.desc: Jannik Sinner competes in his first Indian Wells final as the world number two goes up against re-emerging force Daniil Medvedev, who stunned Carlos Alcaraz in the last four. (15.03)

programme.title: ATP Final: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: In a winner-takes-all showdown for world number one status, rivals Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner meet for the first time this year to determine the Monte-Carlo Masters champion. (12.04)

programme.title: ATP Final: Dallas
programme.desc: Taylor Fritz and Ben Shelton - the Dallas top two - vie for the crown. Fritz downed Marin Cilic in the semi-finals, while Shelton dethroned reigning champion Denis Shapovalov. (15.02)

programme.title: ATP Final: Barcelona
programme.desc: Straight from claiming his 100th tour-level win against teenage sensation Rafael Jodar, Arthur Fils faces Andrey Rublev in a battle for the ATP Barcelona crown.

programme.title: ATP Final: Rome
programme.desc: World number one Jannik Sinner, a win away from completing the Career Golden Masters, meets first-time Rome finalist Casper Ruud - who trails 4-0 in head-to-head meetings. (17.05)

programme.title: ATP Final: Umag
programme.desc: Appearing in his second straight final, Luciano Darderi looks to add the Umag title to the one he won in Bastad last week as the Italian meets 27-year-old Spaniard Carlos Taberner. (26.07)

programme.title: ATP Final: Bastad
programme.desc: A men's singles champion is crowned in the final of the Nordea Open, an ATP Tour 250 clay-court event. (20.07)

programme.title: WTA Final: Iasi
programme.desc: Entering her first final since 2021, Jill Teichmann faces off against Irina-Camelia Begu in the Iasi final. (20.07)

programme.title: ATP Final: Gstaad
programme.desc: In the Gstaad final, second seed Alexander Bublik, chasing his sixth ATP Tour title, takes on Argentina's Juan Manuel Cerundolo - entering his second ever final. (20.07)

programme.title: ATP Final: Indian Wells
programme.desc: Jannik Sinner competes in his first Indian Wells final as the world number two goes up against re-emerging force Daniil Medvedev, who stunned Carlos Alcaraz in the last four. (15.03)

programme.title: ATP Final: Miami
programme.desc: Jannik Sinner's chance to join an exclusive list of Sunshine Double winners arrives as the Italian world number two faces the explosive Czech Jiri Lehecka in the Miami Open final. (29.03)

programme.title: ATP Final: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: In a winner-takes-all showdown for world number one status, rivals Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner meet for the first time this year to determine the Monte-Carlo Masters champion. (12.04)

programme.title: ATP Final: Madrid
programme.desc: Eyeing a historic fifth consecutive ATP Masters 1000 title, world number one Jannik Sinner meets familiar rival and two-time Madrid Open champion Alexander Zverev. (03.05)

programme.title: ATP Final: Rome
programme.desc: World number one Jannik Sinner, a win away from completing the Career Golden Masters, meets first-time Rome finalist Casper Ruud - who trails 4-0 in head-to-head meetings. (17.05)

programme.title: 2007 Djokovic v Federer
programme.desc: At the 2007 Canadian Open, Novak Djokovic defeated the world's top three players in successive matches en route to his second Masters title, including victory in the final over Federer.

programme.title: 2009 Djokovic v Monfils
programme.desc: In one of the most dramatic finals Bercy has ever seen, Novak Djokovic and Gael Monfils went toe to toe in a tightly fought, three-set battle for the 2009 Rolex Paris Masters title.

programme.title: 2011 Djokovic v Nadal
programme.desc: In the 2011 Madrid Open final at the Caja Magica, Novak Djokovic inflicted the first clay-court defeat on Rafael Nadal in nearly two years to claim his fifth title of the year.

programme.title: 2011 Djokovic v Nadal
programme.desc: During a year in which Novak Djokovic dominated Rafael Nadal, one of the Serb's most high-profile victories over the legendary Spaniard came in the final of the 2011 US Open.

programme.title: 2012 Djokovic v Federer
programme.desc: With the 2012 season-ending title on the line at the O2 Arena, two-time defending champion Roger Federer looked to deny world number one Novak Djokovic a second ATP world title.

programme.title: ATP Final: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: In a winner-takes-all showdown for world number one status, rivals Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner meet for the first time this year to determine the Monte-Carlo Masters champion. (12.04)

programme.title: ATP Final: Madrid
programme.desc: Eyeing a historic fifth consecutive ATP Masters 1000 title, world number one Jannik Sinner meets familiar rival and two-time Madrid Open champion Alexander Zverev. (03.05)

programme.title: ATP Final: Rome
programme.desc: World number one Jannik Sinner, a win away from completing the Career Golden Masters, meets first-time Rome finalist Casper Ruud - who trails 4-0 in head-to-head meetings. (17.05)

programme.title: US Open 2025 Review
programme.desc: A review of the men's and women's singles at the 2025 US Open, the final Grand Slam event of the year in New York City.

programme.title: Best of Federer
programme.desc: In what was Roger Federer's first Indian Wells triumph, and Tim Henman's last Masters 1000 final, the Swiss overcame the Briton in just over an hour to claim a first title in the desert.

programme.title: ATP Final: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: In a winner-takes-all showdown for world number one status, rivals Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner meet for the first time this year to determine the Monte-Carlo Masters champion. (12.04)

programme.title: ATP Final: Dallas
programme.desc: Taylor Fritz and Ben Shelton - the Dallas top two - vie for the crown. Fritz downed Marin Cilic in the semi-finals, while Shelton dethroned reigning champion Denis Shapovalov. (15.02)

programme.title: WTA Final: Madrid
programme.desc: Mirra Andreeva, entering her third WTA 1000 final at 19, competes in the Madrid Open showpiece against Marta Kostyuk, with the Ukrainian targeting the biggest title of her career. (02.05)

programme.title: WTA Final: Indian Wells
programme.desc: World number one Aryna Sabalenka and two-time Grand Slam winner Elena Rybakina meet in a rematch of the 2026 Australian Open and the 2023 Indian Wells finals - both won by Rybakina. (15.03)

programme.title: Serena v Hingis 1999
programme.desc: Twenty-two years before Emma Raducanu's triumph over Leylah Fernandez, Serena Williams and Martina Hingis locked horns in an all-teenage final at the 1999 US Open in the women's singles.

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: In the match that resulted in Serena Williams' 14-year boycott of Indian Wells, the 19-year-old fought Kim Clijsters in front of a volatile crowd - ultimately clinching her second title.

programme.title: Best of Serena Williams
programme.desc: Entering the 2002 Miami Open semi-final 22 matches unbeaten, Venus Williams came unstuck against younger sister Serena - who ended a three-year wait for victory over her sibling.

programme.title: Best of Serena Williams
programme.desc: In a seventh consecutive win over Jennifer Capriati - including the previous year's final - Serena Williams extended her unbeaten start to 2003 with another Miami Open success.

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: Clinching the fifth of her eight Miami Open titles, Serena Williams would have to overcome one of her great rivals Justine Henin as the pair met in a highly anticipated 2007 final.

programme.title: Serena v Azarenka 2012
programme.desc: After three sets of gruelling competition in the 2012 final of the women's singles, Serena Williams defeated Victoria Azarenka in the first of two back-to-back finals at the US Open.

programme.title: Best of Serena Williams
programme.desc: The 50th WTA singles title of her trophy-laden career, Serena Williams defeated Maria Sharapova to retain her Madrid Open crown in the 2013 final.

programme.title: Best of Serena Williams
programme.desc: Flawless from start to finish, Serena Williams was untouchable in the Italian capital, topping off a sensational Rome campaign with a straight-sets victory over Victoria Azarenka.

programme.title: Serena v Azarenka 2013
programme.desc: In what was Serena Williams' fifth US Open victory and 17th Grand Slam title overall, the home favourite met Victoria Azarenka once more - the same player she beat the year previous.

programme.title: Best of Serena Williams
programme.desc: In 2013, Serena Williams scooped a record 11 titles, culminating with a come-from-behind win over Li Na to retain her WTA Finals title in Istanbul.

programme.title: WTA Final: Indian Wells
programme.desc: World number one Aryna Sabalenka and two-time Grand Slam winner Elena Rybakina meet in a rematch of the 2026 Australian Open and the 2023 Indian Wells finals - both won by Rybakina. (15.03)

programme.title: WTA Final: Miami
programme.desc: Aryna Sabalenka and Coco Gauff share the stage in a final for the fourth time, with hometown favourite Gauff bidding to deny defending Miami champion Sabalenka the Sunshine Double. (28.03)

programme.title: WTA Final: Rome
programme.desc: Coco Gauff and Elina Svitolina go toe to toe with the Rome title on the line. Gauff eyes redemption after defeat in last year's final, while Svitolina seeks her third triumph here. (16.05)

programme.title: Best of Federer
programme.desc: In what was Roger Federer's first Indian Wells triumph, and Tim Henman's last Masters 1000 final, the Swiss overcame the Briton in just over an hour to claim a first title in the desert.

programme.title: Best of the US Open 2025
programme.desc: Amanda Anisimova, the home favourite, faces Aryna Sabalenka, the defending US Open champion, as the American competes in her second consecutive Grand Slam final. (06.09)

programme.title: Best of the US Open 2025
programme.desc: Jannik Sinner and Carlos Alcaraz play out the next chapter in their rivalry as the reigning champion and the 2022 winner compete for the US Open crown in New York. (07.09)

programme.title: Best of Federer
programme.desc: Overcoming a 21-year-old Andy Murray in the Scot's first Grand Slam final, the Swiss maestro Roger Federer celebrated an unprecedented fifth US Open in a row.

programme.title: Best of Federer
programme.desc: Extending his run of dominance in 2017 with a third career Sunshine Double, Roger Federer added to his Masters 1000 legacy with Miami Open victory over his greatest rival Rafael Nadal.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Here, elevate your putting game with a few pointers. Ep 7.

programme.title: Scottish Open 2023 Highlights
programme.desc: The fourth and final day of the 2023 Genesis Scottish Open, taking place at the Renaissance Club. Among a star-studded field, Xander Schauffele is this year's defending champion. (16.07)

programme.title: The Open Films: Daly 1995
programme.desc: A look back at some of the best contests at The Open in years gone by. Here, The 1995 Open on the Old Course at St Andrews, a tightly fought tournament that went all the way to a play-off.

programme.title: Evian Championship Highlights
programme.desc: The final day of the Amundi Evian Championship at Evian Resort Golf Club in France. Grace Kim earned her first Major title here a year ago. (12.07)

programme.title: Golf Academy: Faldo Driving
programme.desc: The Golf Academy offers guidance and all the key tips and tricks on how to make your golfing game even stronger. First up is Major champion Sir Nick Faldo with a lesson on driving. Ep. 1.

programme.title: Golf Academy: Monty Short Game
programme.desc: Professional golfers give advice on how to improve your game across all aspects, from the tee to the green. Here, Colin Montgomerie offers his top tips on improving your short game.

programme.title: The Open Films: Nicklaus 1970
programme.desc: A look back at some of the best contests at The Open Championship in years gone by. Here, a look at 1970, held on the Old Course at St Andrews, which ended in a tense play-off.

programme.title: The Open - Official Film 1978
programme.desc: A look back at some of the best contests at The Open. Here, a look at the 1978 tournament at the Old Course at St Andrews - the scene of Jack Nicklaus' last win at this Major.

programme.title: The Open Films: Ballesteros 1979
programme.desc: A look back at some of the best contests at The Open in years gone by. Here, 1979, where a memorable week was in store for Seve Ballesteros at Royal Lytham & St Annes Golf Club.

programme.title: Live The Open: At The Range
programme.desc: Ahead of the 154th Open Championship, join some of the game's leading stars and pundits live from the practice range of this year's venue - Royal Birkdale.

programme.title: Chronicles Of A Champion Golfer Tom Watson
programme.desc: A product of the US, Watson crossed the Atlantic to win British hearts. A fascinating look at the epic battles and agonising disappointment for The Open's greatest champion.

programme.title: Chronicles Of A Champion Golfer...
programme.desc: Follow the remarkable golf story of Australia's Ian Baker-Finch, most famous for his surprise win at The 1991 Open Championship at Royal Birkdale.

programme.title: Chronicles Of A Champion Golfer Padraig Harrington
programme.desc: A look at one of The Open's great champions. Here, the focus is on Irishman Padraig Harrington, a two-time Open winner who took back-to-back titles in 2007 and 2008.

programme.title: Chronicles of a Champion Golfer Jordan Spieth
programme.desc: A look back at Jordan Spieth's rise to the top of golf. Spieth won The 146th Open at Royal Birkdale Golf Course, leading wire-to-wire to take home the Claret Jug.

programme.title: Live The Open: At The Range
programme.desc: Ahead of the 154th Open Championship, join some of the game's leading stars and pundits live from the practice range of this year's venue - Royal Birkdale.

programme.title: Justin Rose: Chasing Forever
programme.desc: Chasing the ultimate dream of lifting the Claret Jug, this is Justin Rose's story. Told through four decades of tournament footage, this documentary unpacks his defining moments.

programme.title: The Open: At The Range
programme.desc: Ahead of the 154th Open Championship, join some of the game's leading stars and pundits live from the practice range of this year's venue - Royal Birkdale.

programme.title: Open: Last-Chance Qualifier Hlts
programme.desc: For 12 hopefuls, one place remains in the 154th Open. Over 18 holes at Royal Birkdale, catch up on all the highlights from the last-chance qualifier.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf Highlights
programme.desc: The fourth and final day of the PGA Tour's ISCO Championship, taking place at Hurstbourne Country Club in Louisville, Kentucky. (12.07)
